body: review-spec 2026-06-21 APPROVE — substrate reconciled (choice 0007 refined to verify-auto-accept, 0009 resolved analyst-loads-relate-reads, card 0002 scenarios updated). (2) LOW move duckdb dev→runtime dep; PR reviewer confirms choice-0001 read-only boundary holds (per choice 0014).
